$comment: Manifest of templates available to `wd create` (and `npm create wrangler-deploy`). The CLI reads this to populate the interactive picker. `hello` lives inline in the CLI (zero network, instant scaffold) and is intentionally absent here.

templates.name: react
templates.title: React + Vite (Cloudflare official)
templates.description: Official Cloudflare React + Vite scaffold, then migrated with wrangler-deploy stage workflows

templates.name: vite
templates.title: Vite + Hono + KV
templates.description: Full-stack starter: Vite frontend, Hono worker API, typed KV binding
